incorrects.description: Student placed wrong number of symbols on first attempt

steps.text: Let's look closely—how many symbols do we need for 8 sightings?

incorrects.description: Student placed wrong number of symbols on second attempt

steps.text: Here's a hint: 8 is even, so it splits into 2s perfectly. Each symbol stands for 2 sightings.

incorrects.description: Student placed wrong number of symbols three or more times — system models the answer

params.description: System places 4 full symbols in Rabbits row one at a time

steps.text: Let me show you. Rabbits have 8 sightings. Each symbol = 2, so we need 4 symbols: 2, 4, 6, 8. No half-symbol—8 splits evenly.
